change_summary: Screen to browse the auth audit log with a severity filter, paginated and tenant-scoped.
critical_invariants: The viewer only ever requests the caller's own tenant scope.
Severity filter is purely client-side over already-authorized rows.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Audit-log viewer with severity filter and tenant scoping (FR-1.3 surface).
Implemented (in progress): list + pagination wired to GET /audit/events; severity filter component built.
repo_gates: cd frontend && yarn build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - build ok (partial)

self_review_cycles.findings: tenant scope injected server-side; client cannot widen it
